## Summary

<!-- Briefly describe what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] CI/CD or tooling change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

## Testing

- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck` locally and it passed.
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint` locally and it passed.
- [ ] I ran `npm run build` locally and the build succeeded.
- [ ] I loaded the unpacked `dist/` directory in Chrome and tested the affected functionality.

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not bump the version in `manifest.json` or `package.json` (version bumps happen at release time, not in feature PRs).
- [ ] I did not commit `.env` files, API keys, tokens, or credentials.
- [ ] I did not commit generated ZIPs or the `artifacts/` directory.
- [ ] If this changes extension permissions, I have updated the README permissions section.
- [ ] If this is a breaking change, I have noted it clearly above.
